issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Installation instructions for Windows are missing.
Binary download from GitHub releases lacks checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Nightly encrypted S3 backup with PostgreSQL dump and retention
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses restic init s3:..., pg_dump | restic backup --stdin --stdin-filename, --exclude-file, forget --keep-daily 7 --keep-weekly 4 --keep-monthly 12 --prune, and a weekly restic check as per the skill; baseline relies on tar/aws s3 cp without encryption or dedup.

scenarios.name: Restore a single deleted file from latest snapshot
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs restic snapshots, restic ls latest --path, then restic restore latest --target --include for the specific file path per the skill's documented example; baseline suggests a full restore or generic recovery tools.
